item.title: Mayor accidentally bans pigeons in three-paragraph press release
item.description: The release was supposed to be about parking meters. Officials are now reviewing the entire bird population.

item.title: Local CEO unveils new product, then immediately recalls it on stage
item.description: The CEO claimed the recall was part of the demo. Investors disagree.

item.title: Senator caught defending wrong bill in committee hearing
item.description: An aide reportedly slid the wrong folder across the table.
